title: oldenlandia corymbosa var. erecta
intro: Oldenlandia corymbosa var. erecta, commonly known as 'Erect Oldenlandia', is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, primarily for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are beneficial for various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. The herbal preparations of Erect Oldenlandia include infusions, decoctions, and infusions made from the leaves and stems, which can be consumed orally or used topically as a treatment.
